From: LlamaIndex <news@llamaindex.ai>

Date: Tue, 11 Feb 2025 14:30:00 +0000
Subject: LlamaIndex Newsletter 2025-02-11
Message-ID: <sbOqc3cnRj23uEFhuNq5qQ@geopod-ismtpd-21>
Content-Type: multipart/alternative; boundary="019400ad35963b74f2b39d8a4f8120f44f5b1ab102284ae80e238d9ce49b"

Hi there, Llama Enthusiasts! 🦙

Welcome to this week's edition of the LlamaIndex newsletter!
We're thrilled to share some exciting updates, tutorials, and
community highlights from the past week. Dive in to discover the
latest advancements in AI agents, document processing, and more!

🤩 The Highlights:

* Building a YouTube Research Agent: Check out this fantastic
tutorial on creating a YouTube research agent from scratch using
Gemini Flash 2.0. It integrates tools from @composiohq and
@llama_index for enhanced functionality. Tutorial 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ZoSO4ts3EKUV9kJtvE2Lo9jzLA-SzBy3yPXYBCKy-Ks ).

* DocumentContextExtractor: Open source works! This technique
improves RAG accuracy by providing more context about document
chunks before indexing. Now part of @llama_index! Details 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Jx-MtrLoifkTK0B6T1xal9dns8TjrWHpUcXo8Cpc1ls ).

* Comparing Models: Explore @akshay_pachaar’s thread comparing
the latest closed vs. open-source models for agent applications,
featuring @llama_index and more. Thread ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..sClUmdTFmx5NozltUH0i0ivuabYwqRniVLrWr4yucTI ) .

🗺️ LlamaCloud & LlamaParse:

* Transform PDFs to PowerPoint: Discover how to turn your PDF
documents into dynamic PowerPoint presentations using an
open-source web app built with @llama_index and LlamaParse. Repo
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..eow8zqSQOgeVktVd3vvZfU-rtmhlnABfykUvbgVpCiw ).

✨ Framework:

* Gemini 2.0 Support: Gemini 2.0 from @google is now available,
and we have day 0 support! Get the latest integration package to
start using it. Announcement ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..tPGlMsxaD9nwZRXeACZma5fuk8v9Huu-qDsogmhF8hQ ).

* LlamaParse Enhancements: LlamaParse now supports Gemini 2.0
Flash, offering high-quality document processing at a fraction of
the cost. Notebook ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..WK0JZG9aGfuav2w0S8yCENVC31ZMBLMMA3z0RJb1A-I ).

✍️ Community:

* SciAgents: Check out this automated scientific discovery system
using multi-agent workflows and knowledge graphs, leading to
innovative research hypotheses. Repo ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..7cTVFJBm23hQauAaRarKEKTLk291ONdjZGq-icVESr8 ).

* DeepSeek Forum: Join @aicampai for a virtual forum exploring
Deepseek and its integration into workflows, featuring presenters
from major tech companies. Event Details 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..5hHCM2lWOYmUzcfp6uEJrnsxQHp-7M_GxiJbsGJoCVA ).

* YouTube Video Summarization Bot: Engineer @KaranVaidya6 built a
bot that polls for new YouTube videos, summarizes them, and posts
to Slack, email, or Discord. Details ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..3qqOdB503OVC-PX8EXMTkqBlKkuXgPEDVzWt08cncx8 ).

* Agentic RAG Tutorial: Learn how to build your first RAG
application with @llama_index through a comprehensive video
tutorial. Watch Here ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Lp9Xvvovpjme125HDB8d0sO0QWYze3M1s7b1xZnT-7Q ).

Thank you for being part of our community! We look forward to
bringing you more updates and innovations in the coming weeks. If
you have any questions or suggestions, feel free to reach out!

Best, The LlamaIndex Team

* Calling all enterprises: are you building with LlamaIndex? We
are working hard to make LlamaIndex even more Enterprise-ready
and have sneak peeks at our upcoming products available for
partners. Interested? Get in touch. 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..3-HBoWcXClkNHjv-dBJwrgp2shH3mXe5cbrpjet3iUA )

* Join our Discord ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..jozpPXrQSLbFHAQE1F5tmhjJt3eyBrlva9ordY5Pn-4 )
community for live discussions and support.

* Check out our GitHub ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..7YKdJ5uDYdyk0GyWdHPccGtTSpy6xIXJHZvvbiE5GeQ )  for the latest code releases and documentation.

Thank you for being a part of the LlamaIndex community. We're
here to help you unleash the power of LLMs over your data!

Best regards,
The LlamaIndex Team
